    <h1 {...{
      "id": "router"
    }}>{`Router`}</h1>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "table-of-contents"
    }}>{`Table of Contents`}</h2>
    <p>{`In this document, we will go through the following topics:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Dynamic/Async Routing`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Router and Code Splitting`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Router and Transition`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Router and Loading progress`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Router and Modal`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`Firstly, let's take a look at MetaFox's URL structure`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/`}</inlineCode>{`: Display `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`home`}</inlineCode>{` page or `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`user.home`}</inlineCode>{` page based on the user authentication state.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/blog`}</inlineCode>{`: Display `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`user.browse`}</inlineCode>{` page.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/blog/my`}</inlineCode>{`: Display `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`user.browse.my`}</inlineCode>{` page.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/user`}</inlineCode>{`: Display `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`user.browse`}</inlineCode>{` page.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/user/profile/1`}</inlineCode>{`: Display profile of user`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/pages/profile/14`}</inlineCode>{`: Display profile of pages`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/groups/profile/12`}</inlineCode>{`: Display profile of groups`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/jack`}</inlineCode>{`: Display `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`user.profile`}</inlineCode>{` page, alias of `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/user/profile/1`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/jack/photo`}</inlineCode>{`: Display `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`user.profile.photo`}</inlineCode>{` page, alias of `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/user/profile/1/photo`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/barca`}</inlineCode>{`: Display `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`pages.profile`}</inlineCode>{` as alias of `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/pages/profile/14`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/barca/groups`}</inlineCode>{`: Display `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`pages.profile.groups`}</inlineCode>{` as alias of `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/pages/profile/14/photo`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`/nancy-club`}</inlineCode>{`: Display private `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`groups.profile`}</inlineCode>{` as alias of `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/group/profile/12`}</inlineCode></li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`By using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`react-router-dom`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`React.lazy`}</inlineCode>{`, we can structure React components:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-javascript"
      }}>{`<Router>
  <Switch>
    <Route path="/" component={HomePage} />
    <Route path="/blog" component={BlogPage} />
    <Route path="/blog/my" component={MyBlogPage} />
    <Route path="/user/profile/:userId" component={UserProfilePage} />
    <Route
      path="/user/profile/:userId/photo"
      component={UserProfilePhotoPage}
    />
    <Route path="/pages/profile/:pageId" component={PageProfilePage} />
    <Route
      path="/pages/profile/:pageId/photo"
      component={PageProfilePhotoPage}
    />
    <Route path="/groups/profile/:groupId" component={GroupProfilePage} />
    ... Others Routes
    <NoMatchRoute />
  </Switch>
</Router>
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`As you see `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`blog`}</inlineCode>{`,`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`blog/my`}</inlineCode>{` are static regex URLs, they can be solved easily by using regex or literal strings.`}</p>
    <p>{`While `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/jack`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`jack/photo`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/barca`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/barca/groups`}</inlineCode>{` is more difficult, we have to query database to check if terms of `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`jack`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`barca`}</inlineCode>{` are for  usernames or page slugs.`}</p>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Router gets a request with the pathname `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/jack/photo`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Check router path but no matched`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Keep previous matched Route, showing loading progress bar.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Send async request to get canonical pathname of url `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/jack/photo`}</inlineCode>{` `}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`If getting the canonical pathname `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/user/profile/1/photo`}</inlineCode>{`, replace current location state, keep location pathname.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Router tries to re-run with `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/user/profile/1/photo`}</inlineCode>{` pathname.`}</li>
    </ol>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "best-practices"
    }}>{`Best Practices:`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Application can be configured to use either Loading progress bar or Empty waiting screen`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Should use nested route in user/pages/event profile page. TBD.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Do not base on the browser location. Instead, when developing UI, use `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`$PageContext`}</inlineCode>{` to ask the context to query content instead of browser location.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "code-splitting"
    }}>{`Code Splitting`}</h2>
    <p>{`Because of app sizing, we have to split code of every Page components. `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "/technical/code-splitting"
      }}>{`read more`}</a></p>
    <p>{`At the first time visiting `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/user`}</inlineCode>{` page, the associated chunk file is not ready. Thus, if the network speed is around 1 second, end users may see a flash animation.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "modal-route"
    }}>{`Modal Route`}</h2>
    <p>{`Here is the sample code for a Modal`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-text"
      }}>{`{
  sampleModalDialog: {
    modal: true,
    path: '/m/example/simple-modal',
    component: loadable(() => import('./pages/ExampleModal')),
  },
  sampleModalPage: {
    path: '/m/example/simple-modal',
    component: loadable(() => import('./pages/ExampleModalPage')),
  },
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`You have to create two routes, the first route is for Modal Route, and the seconds is Page Route. You can declare them in `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`routes.ts`}</inlineCode>{` file, with the same path but add property `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`modal`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "how-to-disable-modal-dialog-on-mobile-device"
